title: Avaroa, BW Digital, Ciena, and Vodafone Cook Islands Team Up to Provide Internet Connectivity in Schools
text: RAROTONGA, Cook Islands–(BUSINESS WIRE)–Avaroa Cable Limited (ACL), Ciena (NYSE: CIEN), BW Digital, and Vodafone Cook Islands (Vodafone) are working together to improve connectivity for students in the Cook Islands’ 30 schools for the next three years (2023-2026). The initiative is in collaboration with the Ministry of Education Cook Islands (MoE) and leverages existing Hawaiki (now […]...

title: Ciena's (CIEN) Blue Planet Powers Virgin Media's Fiber Service
text: Ciena (CIEN) helps Virgin Media to modernize its Operational Support Systems and streamline the order-to-service process.

title: Ciena's (CIEN) Coherent Solutions Being Leveraged by EdgeUno
text: Ciena's (CIEN) Waveserver 5 is being utilized by EdgeUno to upgrade its data center interconnect.

title: EdgeUno Improves Network Connectivity in Brazil and Mexico with Ciena's WaveLogic 5 Nano 400ZR Pluggables
text: HANOVER, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--EdgeUno upgraded its data center interconnect network with Ciena's Waveserver 5, powered by WaveLogic 5 Nano 400ZR coherent pluggables.

title: The 3 Best Communication Stocks to Buy Now: September 2023
text: Communications stocks are arguably more important than ever. Whether it is broadband internet, text messages, telephone calls or voice mail, communications dominate our daily lives more than at anytime in human history.

title: Does Ciena's Earnings Beat Signal New Networking Boom Ahead?
text: Telecom gear maker Ciena Corp. NYSE: CIEN gapped up after reporting third-quarter earnings on August 31. Shares reversed lower in the following session, but not nearly enough to fill the gap; Ciena stock closed 16.82% higher for the week.

title: Ciena (CIEN) Q3 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates, Rise Y/Y
text: Ciena's (CIEN) fiscal third-quarter performance benefits from solid demand for its optical line systems and secular growth trends.
